pages.text: $(o)"The world is too loud — only freezing makes it visible."$()$(br2)$(#44CCFF)Cryomancers$() pursue $(l)absolute stillness$(). They argue time itself is entropy's byproduct; only ice lets the original be observed.

pages.title: Creed
pages.text: $(l)Cryomancer$()'s three calms:$(br2)1. $(l)Before acting, cool it$()$(br)2. $(l)Anything that flows can be frozen$()$(br)3. $(l)Patience is another name for ice$()$(br2)Primary element: $(l)Ice$(); minor affinities: $(l)Space$(), $(l)Wind$().

pages.title: History
pages.text: Founded at the $(l)Far-North Observatory$() — now a collapsed astronomical ruin. The first Cryomancers were astronomers who realized "the colder it gets, the slower time runs," and grew obsessed with cooling toward absolute zero.$(br2)Modern Cryomancers are few-worded, few-moved, few-smiled — but their slow-chains are unmatched in the codex.
